Hey Harry,
I dove deep into your brand trying to get a grasp on everything you do, and where I can help. I'll start with an unbiased audit

me to inspect.
Your overall site traffic: You have 55% of your traffic coming from PPC, which is pay per click aka paid traffic (Google,
Facebook, Youtube Pre roll, etc). This drew my interest because it means you have significant room for improvement with
the ability to acquire traffic through both SEO & PPC efforts.
It's also important to point out the numbers below are from your 1 year averages of traffic volume from each source.
Let's look closer at the history of your organic traffic (SEO): You're organic traffic has been up trending! That's awesome to
see. I want to see you vs some of the competitors using the same keywords though to compare keyword volume to traffic
volume and see where you guys are ranking.

an estimated search volume for each of those keywords, and the recommended CPC (cost per click).
That means that any competitors you have your eyes on, we can research their exact PPC strategy, take their best
